languages.text: "Странное подобие песни, грубой и жестокой к незащищенному разуму — вот что слышу я. Для вас, вероятно, даже осознание ее присутствия — непростая задача. Для меня же..." {n}Ирлиэт кривится — видно, что таинственный феномен причиняет ей страдания.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ДРАФТ "Дикая, грубая песнь безумия звучит и в моем разуме, элантах. Но Путь научил меня справляться и с более ужасным шепотом. Что ж, думаю, теперь ты сможешь хоть немного понять ту борьбу, что ведет мой народ внутри себя каждую минуту нашей долгой жизни".

"Странное подобие песни, грубой и жестокой к незащищенному разуму — вот что слышу я. Для вас, вероятно, даже осознание ее присутствия — непростая задача. Для меня же..." {n}Ирлиэт кривится — видно, что таинственный феномен причиняет ей страдания.{/n}
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

languages.text: "A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me, however..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Странное подобие песни, грубой и жестокой к незащищенному разуму — вот что слышу я. Для вас, вероятно, даже осознание ее присутствия — непростая задача. Для меня же..." {n}Ирлиэт кривится — видно, что таинственный феномен причиняет ей страдания.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "A strange semblance of a song, crude and cruel to an unprotected mind, that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

"A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

DRAFT "The wild, coarse song of madness resounds in my mind also, elantach. But the Path has taught me to bear even more terrible whispers than this. I believe that now you understand a little of the struggle my kin wage within themselves every minute of our long lives."

"A strange semblance of a song, crude and cruel to an unprotected mind, that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

"A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

"A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me, however..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

languages.text: «Una extraña melodía, dura y cruel para una mente desprotegida. Eso es lo que oigo. Para ti, imagino que hasta percibirla es difícil. Pero para mí...». {n}Yrliet hace una mueca que refleja el dolor que le está causando el misterioso fenómeno.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Una extraña melodía, dura y cruel para una mente desprotegida. Eso es lo que oigo. Para ti, imagino que hasta percibirla es difícil. Pero para mí...». {n}Yrliet hace una mueca que refleja el dolor que le está causando el misterioso fenómeno.{/n}

languages.text: “一种奇异的、类似歌谣的存在，对毫无防护的心智而言，刺耳又残酷——这便是我所听见的。于你而言，恐怕连察觉它的存在都相当困难。但对我来说……”{n}伊莉耶特眉头紧蹙，显然这神秘的现象正给她造成真切的痛苦。{/n}
languages.original_text: "A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “一种奇异的、类似歌谣的存在，对毫无防护的心智而言，刺耳又残酷——这便是我所听见的。于你而言，恐怕连察觉它的存在都相当困难。但对我来说……”{n}伊莉耶特眉头紧蹙，显然这神秘的现象正给她造成真切的痛苦。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est comme une étrange chanson, brutale et cruelle pour un esprit vulnérable. Voilà ce que j'entends. Pour vous, la seule perception de sa présence doit être difficile, mais pour moi... » {n}Yrliet grimace. Il est clair que ce mystérieux phénomène lui cause une véritable souffrance.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est comme une étrange chanson, brutale et cruelle pour un esprit vulnérable. Voilà ce que j'entends. Pour vous, la seule perception de sa présence doit être difficile, mais pour moi... » {n}Yrliet grimace. Il est clair que ce mystérieux phénomène lui cause une véritable souffrance.{/n}

languages.text: "Tuhaf bir şarkıya benziyor, korumasız bir zihin için sert ve acımasız. Benim duyduğum bu. Senin için varlığını algılamak bile muhtemelen zor bir iştir. Ama benim için..." {n}Yrliet yüzünü buruşturuyor. Bu gizemli olgunun ona gerçekten acı verdiği açıkça görülüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tuhaf bir şarkıya benziyor, korumasız bir zihin için sert ve acımasız. Benim duyduğum bu. Senin için varlığını algılamak bile muhtemelen zor bir iştir. Ama benim için..." {n}Yrliet yüzünü buruşturuyor. Bu gizemli olgunun ona gerçekten acı verdiği açıkça görülüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Eine seltsame Ähnlichkeit mit einem Lied, hart und grausam für einen ungeschützten Verstand ... das höre ich jedenfalls. Für Euch dürfte es schwierig sein, es überhaupt wahrzunehmen. Für mich hingegen ..." {n}Yrliet verzieht das Gesicht. Offensichtlich bereitet ihr das mysteriöse Phänomen Schmerzen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Eine seltsame Ähnlichkeit mit einem Lied, hart und grausam für einen ungeschützten Verstand ... das höre ich jedenfalls. Für Euch dürfte es schwierig sein, es überhaupt wahrzunehmen. Für mich hingegen ..." {n}Yrliet verzieht das Gesicht. Offensichtlich bereitet ihr das mysteriöse Phänomen Schmerzen.{/n}

languages.text: "無防備な心に厳しく残酷な、奇妙な歌の似姿--それが私には聞こえる。あなたにとっては、その存在に気づくことさえ難しいことでしょう。でも私には......"{n}不思議な現象が彼女を苦しめているのは明らかだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "A strange semblance of a song, harsh and cruel to an unprotected mind — that is what I hear. For you, even perceiving its presence is likely a difficult task. For me though..." {n}Yrliet grimaces, and it is clear that the mysterious phenomenon is causing her genuine pain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "無防備な心に厳しく残酷な、奇妙な歌の似姿--それが私には聞こえる。あなたにとっては、その存在に気づくことさえ難しいことでしょう。でも私には......"{n}不思議な現象が彼女を苦しめているのは明らかだ。{/n}
